title: CRC-32C (Castagnoli) — iSCSI / SCTP / btrfs / SSE4.2
signature: pub fn crc32c(seed: u32, buf: &[u8]) -> u32
notes: Castagnoli polynomial 0x82F63B78 (reflected form of 0x1EDC6F41). Hardware-accelerated by SSE4.2 `crc32` instruction. Same structure as zlib CRC-32 but different polynomial. Initial 0xFFFFFFFF, final XOR 0xFFFFFFFF.
